Gonna make a new website that pays you a small finders fee of provably new data - the amount you are paid is based on how new the data is and how many rows x columns. Manually approved payouts. Give me all the data, I’ll pay.

Shoutout to @newsroomdev for lots of good momentum and energy around @dataproofer 2.0 – just pushed a new update last night that makes it super easy to integrate with GitHub Actions based on Twitter feedback from our last release. Couldn’t ask for a better collaborator.
